creator: deepbluemistake@gmail.com
text:
The XHTML is invalid on FreeBSD's main page:
https://www.freebsd.org/
It's proclaimed as invalid in both of these:
https://validator.w3.org/
https://validator.w3.org/nu/

This is a different bug than
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=241732
because the home/main/index page doesn't seem to be generated by DocBook.

I'm willing to fix this bug myself since I'm proficient in HTML.
